summary: Executed backend API regression and frontend Playwright validation against public preview URL. Core navigation, page rendering, health endpoint, and no-memory assistant/settings flows are working.

integration_issues.issue: Headless browser microphone attempt did not produce a persisted memory/transcript in this run (count remained 0). Could not conclusively validate real-device recording pipeline from automation environment.

action_items: Run one manual real-device recording validation in preview/prod-like browser to confirm Mic -> Whisper worker -> IndexedDB save path.
Pin ai-worker transformers dependency version instead of @latest to reduce runtime drift risk.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/public/ai-worker.js imports @huggingface/transformers@latest from CDN; using @latest in production can introduce untracked breaking/runtime changes.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_memory_capsule_client via POST /api/status during API test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright flow validated Capture/Memories/Assistant/Settings rendering and nav. Assistant no-memory response works. Clear memories confirm dialog works. Console had warnings from transformers CDN model loading but no runtime errors. Recording attempt in headless environment did not increment memory count; needs real-device retest.
rca of the issue: Likely environment limitation for reliable microphone capture in headless automation (virtual mic stream/silence), not confirmed app logic failure. Reproduce by running in real browser with physical microphone, recording >3s speech, then verify recent-memory-count increments and memory appears in Memories list.
